prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Forecast remaining useful life for transformer T-016 and state whether it can safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should report an RUL estimate in days, compare it against the 180-day horizon, and provide a clear maintenance recommendation.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [tsfm] get_rul — Get the current RUL estimate for transformer T-016
  Step 2: [tsfm] forecast_rul — Forecast the RUL for transformer T-016 180 days into the future (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [tsfm] none — Determine if the transformer can safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance (depends on steps [2])
  Step 4: [tsfm] none — Determine if the current RUL estimate of 57 days for transformer T-016 is sufficient for safe operation over the next 180 days without major maintenance, considering the interpretation that maintenance is recommended within 30 days.
  Step 5: [wo] estimate_downtime — Since the RUL estimate indicates the transformer may not safely operate for 180 days, estimate the downtime required for maintenance on transformer T-016, assuming a severity level based on its health index and FDD category. (depends on steps [4])
  Step 6: [wo] create_work_order — Create a work order for transformer T-016 to address the maintenance needs indicated by its RUL estimate and health status, including a description of the issue, priority, and estimated downtime. (depends on steps [5])
  Step 7: [wo] update_work_order — Update the work order for transformer T-016 with any additional notes or changes in status as necessary, ensuring that all relevant information is captured and accessible for maintenance personnel. (depends on steps [6])
  Step 8: [wo] estimate_downtime — Estimate the downtime required for maintenance on transformer T-016, assuming a severity level based on its health index and FDD category, using the previously obtained RUL estimate and health status as context.
  Step 9: [wo] create_work_order — Create a work order for transformer T-016 to address the maintenance needs indicated by its RUL estimate and health status, including a description of the issue, priority, and estimated downtime obtained from the previous step. (depends on steps [8])
  Step 10: [wo] update_work_order — Update the work order for transformer T-016 with any additional notes or changes in status as necessary, ensuring that all relevant information is captured and accessible for maintenance personnel, based on the work order created in the previous step. (depends on steps [9])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)

    "step": 1,
    "task": "Get the current RUL estimate for transformer T-016",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "get_rul",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-016"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-016\",\n  \"as_of_date\": \"2024-01-31\",\n  \"rul_days\": 57,\n  \"health_index\": 0.0522,\n  \"fdd_category\": 4,\n  \"confidence\": 0.808,\n  \"interpretation\": \"Degraded \\u2014 maintenance recommended within 30 days.\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,
    "verifier_decision": "replan_suffix",
    "verifier_reason": "RUL estimate is lower than required safe operation period",
    "verifier_updated_focus": "Assess maintenance needs for transformer T-016",
    "retries_used": 0,
    "verifier_replan_raw_plan": [
      {
        "step": 1,
        "task": "Determine if the current RUL estimate of 57 days for transformer T-016 is sufficient for safe operation over the next 180 days without major maintenance, considering the interpretation that maintenance is recommended within 30 days.",

...(truncated)

## Agent Final Answer
The remaining useful life (RUL) for transformer T-016 is estimated to be 57 days as of January 31, 2024. Based on this estimate and the interpretation that maintenance is recommended within 30 days, it is unlikely that the transformer can safely operate for the next 180 days without major maintenance.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:

    "task_completion": true,

    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "Improve the agent's planning to avoid redundant steps and enhance efficiency."
}
